steps.title: Focus on the contrast
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between Rafael Quinones and James Catchings. The useful note is that Quinones played guitar while Catchings played cello.

steps.title: Reject noncontrast choices
steps.content:
• Choice A emphasizes that both musicians contributed to India Arie albums.
  • Choice C mentions only Quinones and focuses on release timing.
  • Choice D discusses the albums without naming either musician.

steps.title: Name the different instruments
steps.content: The remaining choice uses but and whereas to contrast guitar with cello, directly emphasizing the difference between the two musicians. The answer is B.
